title: [T3.1] Build complete filesystem/process/signal parity matrix

gaps.divergence_risk: migration friction for tokio convenience wrappers

evidence_requirements: lab/runtime parity tests for deterministic fs behavior

gaps.divergence_risk: io_uring path semantics drift from blocking path
evidence_requirements: cross-path equivalence tests with io-uring on/off
platform matrix tests/docs for symlink_file/symlink_dir behavior

gaps.divergence_risk: blocking wait semantics vs async tokio behavior
evidence_requirements: async wait parity tests under load and cancellation

gaps.divergence_risk: missing PTY parity for interactive workloads
evidence_requirements: PTY capability matrix and e2e lifecycle tests
platform behavior table and CI evidence per supported OS

gaps.divergence_risk: zombie/leak or output truncation on cancellation
evidence_requirements: deterministic cancellation drills with kill_on_drop variants
windows-specific contract tests and behavior docs per signal class

gaps.divergence_risk: non-unix signal stream unsupported behavior ambiguity
evidence_requirements: deterministic fallback tests and migration guidance for non-unix builds
burst-signal e2e tests with monotonic counters and no-loss assertions
integration tests for controller plus os-signal race behavior

platform_semantics.known_divergence_risk: link semantics and permissions differ by os

platform_semantics.unix: io_uring feature path available on linux
platform_semantics.known_divergence_risk: fast-path behavior may drift from blocking-offload path
wait/kill/stdio edge behavior can differ by platform

platform_semantics.windows: api shape exposed with backend constraints
platform_semantics.known_divergence_risk: ctrl_c availability assumptions can fail off unix

conformance_contracts.focus: VFS deterministic replay and fault-injection seam
pass_criteria: Vfs trait requires Send + Sync
VfsFile requires AsyncRead + AsyncWrite + AsyncSeek + Send + Unpin
UnixVfs implements Vfs
Vfs methods return io::Result enabling mock error injection
conformance_contracts.failure_semantics: emit FS-G3 diagnostic with owner src/fs/vfs.rs and failing conformance assertion
conformance_contracts.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_fs_process_signal_parity_matrix t37c_01 -- --nocapture

conformance_contracts.focus: FS cancel-safety protocol across async operations
pass_criteria: File::open and File::create are cancel-safe
WritePermit pattern documented for cancel-safe writes
sync_all and sync_data are cancel-safe
conformance_contracts.failure_semantics: emit FS-G2 diagnostic with owner src/fs/file.rs and the cancel-safety invariant that failed
conformance_contracts.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_fs_process_signal_parity_matrix t37c_02 -- --nocapture

pass_criteria: write_atomic exists in path_ops with complete-or-nothing semantics
try_exists returns io::Result<bool>
IO errors preserve ErrorKind through async boundaries
conformance_contracts.failure_semantics: emit FS-G1 diagnostic with owner src/fs/path_ops.rs and missing API or fidelity invariant
conformance_contracts.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_fs_process_signal_parity_matrix t37c_03 -- --nocapture

pass_criteria: Command builder provides new/arg/args/env/current_dir/stdin/stdout/stderr/kill_on_drop/spawn
Child provides id/kill/try_wait/wait_async/wait_with_output_async
ExitStatus provides code/success
Stdio provides inherit/piped/null
conformance_contracts.failure_semantics: emit PR-G1 diagnostic with owner src/process.rs and missing lifecycle method
conformance_contracts.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_fs_process_signal_parity_matrix t37c_04 -- --nocapture

pass_criteria: kill_on_drop setter exists on Command
Child::kill returns Result
Drop impl handles cleanup when kill_on_drop(true) is set
conformance_contracts.failure_semantics: emit PR-G4 diagnostic with owner src/process.rs and the cleanup invariant that failed
conformance_contracts.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_fs_process_signal_parity_matrix t37c_05 -- --nocapture

conformance_contracts.focus: process error classification and spawn fault injection
pass_criteria: ProcessError has Io, NotFound, PermissionDenied, Signaled variants
NotFound and PermissionDenied include program name
Signaled includes signal number
Command::spawn maps ENOENT to NotFound and EACCES to PermissionDenied
conformance_contracts.failure_semantics: emit PR-G3 diagnostic with owner src/process.rs and missing error variant or mapping
conformance_contracts.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_fs_process_signal_parity_matrix t37c_06 -- --nocapture

conformance_contracts.focus: signal delivery monotonicity and coalescing correctness
pass_criteria: Signal::recv returns Option<()>
delivery counter uses AtomicU64 with monotonic fetch_add
seen_deliveries tracking prevents double-delivery
SignalKind covers Interrupt, Terminate, Hangup, Quit, User1, User2, Child, Pipe, Alarm
conformance_contracts.failure_semantics: emit SG-G3 diagnostic with owner src/signal/signal.rs and the delivery invariant that failed
conformance_contracts.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_fs_process_signal_parity_matrix t37c_07 -- --nocapture

conformance_contracts.focus: shutdown convergence and graceful outcome classification
pass_criteria: ShutdownController provides new/subscribe/shutdown
ShutdownReceiver provides wait/is_shutting_down
GracefulOutcome has Completed(T) and ShutdownSignaled variants
with_graceful_shutdown correctly races future against shutdown receiver
conformance_contracts.failure_semantics: emit SG-G4 diagnostic with owner src/signal/shutdown.rs and the convergence or classification invariant that failed
conformance_contracts.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_fs_process_signal_parity_matrix t37c_08 -- --nocapture

fault_injection_scenarios.expected_behavior: io::Error propagated; no silent data corruption
io::Error with PermissionDenied; no handle leak

fault_injection_scenarios.injection_point: rapid inject() calls on signal slot

fault_injection_scenarios.expected_behavior: exactly one transition; all subscribers notified; idempotent

signal_contracts.focus: unix signal stream creation and delivery semantics
pass_criteria: signal(SignalKind::terminate()) succeeds on unix
injected delivery is observed by recv() without silent drop
raw mapping includes SIGPIPE and SIGALRM
signal_contracts.failure_semantics: emit SG-G3 diagnostics with owner module and failing test identifier
signal_contracts.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync signal_recv_observes_delivery -- --nocapture

pass_criteria: non-unix behavior for signal() remains explicit via unsupported path
ctrl_c availability gate remains explicit and deterministic
signal_contracts.failure_semantics: emit SG-G1/SG-G2 diagnostics with owner module and unsupported-path mismatch
signal_contracts.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync ctrl_c_not_available -- --nocapture

pass_criteria: shutdown reaches all subscribers
double shutdown is idempotent
late subscribers observe already-initiated shutdown
concurrent shutdown calls converge on a stable state
signal_contracts.failure_semantics: emit SG-G4 diagnostics with e2e test case id and owner module
signal_contracts.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync --test e2e_signal -- --nocapture

pass_criteria: SG-G1..SG-G4 remain synchronized between markdown and json artifacts
signal contract rows remain complete with owner modules, artifacts, and repro commands
drift diagnostics map each violation to owning bead/module
signal_contracts.failure_semantics: emit T3-DRIFT diagnostics with missing field/path and owning bead asupersync-2oh2u.3.5
signal_contracts.reproduction_command: rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync --test tokio_fs_process_signal_parity_matrix -- --nocapture

drift_detection_rules.rule: all ownership and evidence paths referenced by the matrix must exist in-repo
gap coverage must retain fs/process/signal families without silent row loss
platform semantics coverage must include unix/windows/wasm rows
each gap must preserve concrete downstream bead mapping
markdown and json artifacts must agree on bead id and declared gap ids
signal_contracts must include SGC-01..SGC-04 with pass criteria, owner modules, artifacts, and reproduction command
all signal contract owner/artifact paths must exist and each reproduction command must be rch-routed
conformance_contracts must include T37C-01..T37C-08 with bead_id, domain, pass_criteria, owner_modules, mapped_gap, and reproduction_command
all conformance contract owner/artifact paths must exist and each reproduction command must be rch-routed

ci_commands: rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync --test tokio_fs_process_signal_parity_matrix -- --nocapture
rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync --test e2e_signal -- --nocapture
rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync ctrl_c_not_available -- --nocapture
rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync signal_recv_observes_delivery -- --nocapture
rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_fs_process_signal_parity_matrix t37c -- --nocapture
